zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale於1470年2月9日出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾阿沃代爾時，他的父親Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale27歲，母親Elizabeth MacDonald20歲。他於1499年2月4日與Lady Margaret Kennedy在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登努結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1499年在蘇格蘭被列為1st lord of avondale (2nd creation)。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale于1470年2月9日出生在苏格兰藍納可爾阿沃代爾时，他的父亲Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale27岁，母亲Elizabeth MacDonald20岁。他于1499年2月4日与Lady Margaret Kennedy在英国苏格兰艾斯爾登努结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1499年在苏格兰被列为1st lord of avondale (2nd creation)。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale was born on 9 February 1470, in Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth MacDonald, was 20. He married Lady Margaret Kennedy on 4 February 1499, in Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. In 1499, his occupation is listed as 1st lord of avondale (2nd creation) in Scotland. He died on 9 September 1513, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale est né le 9 février 1470, à Avondale, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth MacDonald, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Kennedy le 4 février 1499, à Dunure, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. En 1499, sa profession de son indiquée est 1st lord of avondale (2nd creation) à Écosse. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale am 9. Februar 1470 in Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth MacDonald 20. Er hat am 4. Februar 1499 in Dunure, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Kennedy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1499 ist sein Beruf als 1st lord of avondale (2nd creation) in Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale è nato il il 9 febbraio 1470 nel Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth MacDonald, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Kennedy il 4 febbraio 1499, nel Dunure, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1499, la sua occupazione è indicata come 1st lord of avondale (2nd creation) nel Scotland. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondaleが1470年2月9日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアアボンダルで生まれた時，父Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandaleは27歳，母Elizabeth MacDonaldは20歳であった。1499年2月4日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダヌアでLady Margaret Kennedyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1499年，スコットランドでの職業は1st lord of avondale (2nd creation)と記録されている。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale(이)가 1470년 2월 9일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 아폰데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth MacDonald(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1499년 2월 4일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 던르에서 Lady Margaret Kennedy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1499년, 그의 직업은 스컷랜드에서 1st lord of avondale (2nd creation)이었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.9 February 1470–9 September 1513: 9 de fevereiro de 1470–9 de setembro de 1513
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale nasceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1470, em Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth MacDonald, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Kennedy em 4 de fevereiro de 1499, em Dunure, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1499, sua profissão aparece como 1st lord of avondale (2nd creation) em Scotland. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale родился 9 февраля 1470 г. в местности авондеил, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth MacDonald, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Kennedy 4 февраля 1499 г. в местности дунур, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1499 году он работал по профессии 1st lord of avondale (2nd creation) в местности Шотландия. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.

sm.From 1499 to 1513: mai le 1499 e o'o I le 1513

es.9 February 1470–9 September 1513: 9 de febrero de 1470–9 de septiembre de 1513
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale nació el 9 de febrero de 1470, en Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Stewart Laird of Avandale, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth MacDonald, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Kennedy el 4 de febrero de 1499, en Dunure, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1499, su ocupación registrada era 1st lord of avondale (2nd creation) en Scotland. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años.
